title: GWarp
body:
![https://i.imgur.com/PoJEawX.png](https://i.imgur.com/PoJEawX.png)

# Warp / Home - Plugin


**General:**

**This is a huge Warp and Home Plugin with a lot of Settings and Functions that all can be changed by you in the Plugin-Config and the Lang-Files.**

**Now with Support from 1.7 to 26.2!**



**[✅ Check out the Premium-Version: ✅](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/81461)**

**[⭐ GWarpPro ⭐](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/81461)**

[![https://i.imgur.com/aLZqJgm.png?1](https://i.imgur.com/aLZqJgm.png?1)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/81461)



**===================================================================================**

**Special Features:**

100% customizable
Very good performance

Safe-Warp Feature
<details>
<summary>safe-warp-pictures</summary>


If the Safe-Warp feature is active, you can teleport to this setup:

![https://i.imgur.com/XGZkdiU.jpg](https://i.imgur.com/XGZkdiU.jpg)

If the Safe-Warp feature is active, you can't teleport to this setup:

![https://i.imgur.com/u5lVhKC.jpg](https://i.imgur.com/u5lVhKC.jpg) 


</details>


A huge amount of settings to customize!

Warp-Cooldown
Warp-Particle-Effects
Warp-Teleport-Sounds
Warp-Passwords
Tab-Complete for all Commands
Warp-Toplist
<details>
<summary>warp-top-picture</summary>



![https://i.imgur.com/mVlTYYT.jpg](https://i.imgur.com/mVlTYYT.jpg) 


</details>

Warp-List
<details>
<summary>warp-list-picture</summary>



![https://i.imgur.com/EInqRiv.jpg](https://i.imgur.com/EInqRiv.jpg) 


</details>
Warp-Visitor-Counter
Warp-Welcome-Messages
Can set endless Warps

Private Homes
Can set endless Homes

**And many more......**</center>


**===================================================================================**

**Safe-Warp:**

**This Plugin supports a Feature named Safe-Warp!**

**You can enable or disable it in the Plugin-Config.**


**What is Safe-Warp?**

Safe-Warp checks if a Warp is Safe befor you were teleported to them, 
so you are protected at traps, lava or other ways to kill the teleported Player.

**When is a Warp safe?**

A Warp is safe when 1 Block in each Direction of the Warp-Location is 
Air and the Block under the Warp-Location is a soild Block.

**===================================================================================**



**Commands:**

<details>
<summary>  /gwarp (warp) - commands</summary>

**gwarp (warp):**

* /gwarp <Warpname>
* /gwarp help
* /gwarp top
* /gwarp list <Number>
* /gwarp set <Warpname>
* /gwarp delete <Warpname>
* /gwarp update <Warpname>
* /gwarp welcome <Warpname> <Text>/clear
* /gwarp warps [<Playername>]
* /gwarp lock <Warpname>
* /gwarp owner <Warpname>
* /gwarp password <Warpname> [<Password>/clear]
* /gwarp effect [<Warpname>] [<Effectname>/clear]
* /gwarp sound [<Warpname>] [<Soundname>/clear]

</details>

<details>
<summary>  /agwarp (awarp) - commands</summary>


**agwarp (awarp):**

* /agwarp help
* /agwarp version
* /agwarp warp <Playername> <Warpname>

* /agwarp set <Warpname> <Playername>

* /agwarp delete <Warpname>

* /agwarp welcome <Warpname> <Text>/clear

* /agwarp lock <Warpname>

* /agwarp setowner <Warpname> <Playername>

* /agwarp reset <Warpname>/all

* /agwarp password <Warpname> [<Password>/clear]

* /agwarp effect [<Warpname>] [<Effectname>/clear]

* /agwarp sound [<Warpname>] [<Soundname>/clear]

* /agwarp count <Warpname>

</details>

<details>
<summary>  /ghome (home) - commands</summary>

**ghome (home):**

* /ghome <Homename>
* /ghome set <Homename>

* /ghome delete <Homename>

* /ghome update <Homename>

* /ghome homes: default
* /ghome back


</details>

<details>
<summary>  /gwarpreload (gwrl) - commands</summary>


**gwarpreload (gwrl):**

* /gwarpreload


</details>

<details>
<summary>  shortcards - commands</summary>


**Shortcards:**

* /setgwarp (setwarp):

* /setgwarp <Warpname>




* /deletegwarp (deletewarp / delwarp):

* /deletegwarp <Warpname>




* /updategwarp (updatewarp):

* /updatewarp <Warpname>




</details>


**===================================================================================**

**Permissions:**

**OP-Permission:** GWarp.*
**Version-Update:** GWarp.Update

<details>
<summary>gwarp.warp - permissions</summary>


**GWarp.Warp:**

* GWarp.Warp.*
* GWarp.WarpAmount.*

* GWarp.WarpAmount.<AmountNumber>

* GWarp.Warp

* GWarp.WarpTimeIgnore

* GWarp.WarpTop

* GWarp.WarpList

* GWarp.WarpSet

* GWarp.WarpDelete

* GWarp.WarpUpdate

* GWarp.WarpWelcome

* GWarp.WarpWarps

* GWarp.WarpWarpsOther

* GWarp.WarpLock

* GWarp.WarpLockIgnore

* GWarp.WarpOwner

* GWarp.WarpPassword

* GWarp.WarpEffect

* GWarp.WarpSound

* GWarp.WarpPasswordIgnore

* GWarp.WarpSaveIgnore


</details>

<details>
<summary>gwarp.awarp - permissions</summary>


**GWarp.AWarp:**

* GWarp.AWarp.*

* GWarp.AWarp

* GWarp.AWarpWarp

* GWarp.AWarpSet

* GWarp.AWarpDelete

* GWarp.AWarpUpdate

* GWarp.AWarpWelcome

* GWarp.AWarpLock

* GWarp.AWarpSetOwner

* GWarp.AWarpReset

* GWarp.AWarpPassword

* GWarp.AWarpEffect

* GWarp.AWarpSound

* GWarp.AWarpCount


</details>
<details>
<summary>gwarp.home - permissions</summary>


**GWarp.Home:**

* GWarp.Home.*

* GWarp.HomeAmount.*

* GWarp.HomeAmount.<AmountNumber>

* GWarp.Home

* GWarp.HomeTimeIgnore

* GWarp.HomeSet

* GWarp.HomeDelete

* GWarp.HomeUpdate

* GWarp.HomeHomes

</details>
<details>
<summary>gwarp.gwarpreload - permission</summary>


**GWarp.GWarpReload:**

* GWarp.GWarpReload


</details>

**===================================================================================**

**Lang-Files:**</center>

**Change Language:**

* Set the "Lang.lang"-Option in the Config.yml to your chosen Language


**Add a new Language-File:**

* Copy one of the Lang-Files and Name it like you will
* Change the Messages in the Lang-File
* Set the "Lang.lang"-Option in the Config.yml to your created Lang-File

**===================================================================================**

**Stats:**

[![https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/GWarp.svg](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/GWarp.svg)](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/gwarp)</center>

**===================================================================================**

**This Plugin supports the Minecraft Versions:**
**1.7, 1.8, 1.9, 1.10 , 1.11, 1.12 , 1.13, 1.14, 1.15, 1.16, 1.17, 1.18, 1.19, 1.20, 1.21, 26.1 & 26.2**
